creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
It works for me in a 13.2-RELEASE-p2 jail under poudriere and I've not see failures from the ports cluster so I'm inclined towards something unique in your environment.  I've updated the jail to -p3 and have kicked off another build but I doubt that's the issue.

You might try forcibly updating all of swig's dependencies.

You could also disable lldb as a workaround.
